⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

/Focus findings search (when findings panel visible)
jNext finding in list
kPrevious finding in list
EnterOpen selected finding detail
← →Navigate findings in detail modal
EscClose modal / clear search
pPause / Resume standalone recon
hToggle session history
eOpen unified endpoints panel
sOpen unified subdomains panel
gOpen Attack Graph / Kill Chain
mOpen Risk Heatmap
tOpen Targets / Multi-Target View
iOpen Screenshot Gallery
xOpen Secrets Intelligence Panel
yOpen Technologies Intelligence Panel
aOpen Atlas Intelligence Dashboard
lOpen LLM Intelligence Panel
nDismiss latest notification
Ctrl+LFocus target input (Manual mode)
?Show this help

Shortcuts are disabled when a text input is focused.
